headline: Assessing Monster Beverage (MNST) Valuation After Mixed Recent Share Returns
summary: What Monster Beverage’s Recent Returns Tell You Monster Beverage (MNST) has delivered mixed share performance lately, with a small gain over the past 3 months but a decline over the past month, even as its 1 year and multi year total returns remain positive. See our latest analysis for Monster Beverage. Recent trading has been softer, with a 7 day share price return of 6.58% and a 30 day share price return of 8.26%. However, the 1 year total shareholder return of 35.78% still points to solid...
